2317180.name: Cube Crusaders
2317180.description:
Adoros is dying.

A catastrophic Void Anomaly threatens to tear open Adoros' surface, warping reality and unleashing forces no one fully understands. You are a Cube Crusader, sent to deal with this threat for the continued success of the Crusades.

CUSTOMIZE YOUR CRUSADER

Enjoy a full customization system inspired by a classic arena shooter that rhymes with Kalo. Mix and match your favourite pieces, apply particle effects, and visor colours to get the perfect look.

CAMPAIGN

Take on Adoros' various metroidvania style underground as you seek to crush the Void Anomaly and the horrors it produces alone, or with a local couch co-op buddy. 

The means by which you achieve this is up to you. Strength through forced unity? Autonomy? Apathy? The choice is yours.

PVE HORDE MODE - LOCAL OR ONLINE:

Something underground has inflicted great suffering on the Cube Crusaders on the surface of Adoros, and turned them into Cube-Eating zombies! Fight for survival as the horde becomes more numerous and powerful with each new wave, with up to 24 players online (2 locally) against this endless onslaught...
2317180.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
